title: Domino's Bolts To Future Of Pizza Delivery By Deal Harnessing 800 EVs
text: Domino's has used all sorts of technologies to pull itself to the top of the global pizza business over the last decade or so, and now it is banking on another tech-based gambit to continue the climb: all-electric delivery vehicles.

title: Is it Time to Take a Bite into Domino's Pizza?
text: In this article, we'll explain why it may be time for investors to take a bite of DPZ stock while it's trading below its pre-pandemic price

title: Domino's Pizza Could Deliver Superior Returns As Bear Case Crumbles
text: Domino's Pizza, Inc. has declined more than 33% in 2022 as headwinds such as cost of inputs, labor shortages, and tepid sales weigh on short-term performance. These are transitory and manageable challenges, as Domino's Pizza has strong pricing power and can protect its margins by passing on costs to consumers.

title: Domino's: A Buy If You're Looking For More Dough
text: Domino's has been a stellar growth stock over an extended period. The sharp selloff has presented long-term-oriented investors with a reasonable entry point.

title: Domino's Pizza is likely to enter 2023 with decade-high prices, analyst says — and they could rise more on some items
text: Domino's Pizza Inc. is likely to enter next year with its highest prices in more than a decade, and the company could raise them even more on some of its core offerings, an analyst said Monday.
